cover.title: CAMPAIGN TITLE
cover.subtitle: A briefing or operation subtitle goes here.

leftPage.body:
Welcome to LiftRPG. 

This is your rulebook or briefing. You should explain the setting, what the player must do, and what the ultimate goal is.

You can use multiple paragraphs.

rightPage.title: Survey Record
rightPage.instruction: Record each week's component below. When all positions are filled, assemble the complete password.

epigraph.text: A thematic quote or narrative hook for the week.

sessions.storyPrompt: A very brief narrative moment right before the exercise.
